prompt:
You are shown the last 1-2 rendered pages (in order) of the region for "Item 9B. Other Information". The next section is "Item 15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules".
Find where Item 9B ends — right before the "Item 15" heading if it appears, otherwise the very bottom of the last page — and transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 9B before that point. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text: The provided images do not contain "Item 9B. Other Information" or "Item 15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules". They contain Items 10 through 14.
